concept: Summer / Season of Abundance / Time of Fullness
description: The warmest season of the year; time of growth and abundance. 'Keloi' names the full season—long days, warm nights, life at its peak.
sound_symbolism: The word expands in warmth. 'Ke' begins with clear energy, vitality present. 'Lo' flows with ease, abundance spreading. Finally 'i' rises to the peak, summer arrived.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'mua keloi' (in summer). Second of the four seasons. Time of growth, activity, and long daylight.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Summer offers maximum solar energy—the season when sun-based systems can generate surplus.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Summer was work season—long days for tending crops, building, traveling while conditions allowed.
